scripts.dev:e2e: pnpm db:migrate:deploy && pnpm db:seed && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.dev:e2e:serverless: pnpm db:migrate:deploy && pnpm db:seed && tsx watch src/serverless.ts
scripts.db:push: pnpm db:generate && prisma db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma --skip-generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm db:generate && prisma migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm db:generate && prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
